docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED APR-17-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONCEICAO, ISABEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPOSITO, FELIX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONCEICAO, ISABEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,491.28 FILED BY ESPOSITO, FELIX AS TO DEFENDANT CONCEICAO, ISABEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S DAUGHTER MARIE CONCEICAO ACTS AS SPANISH INTERPRETER ON HER BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
